summary: The diff implements REQ-1 comprehensively. All seven form section components (PersonalInfoSection, EducationSection, ExperienceSection, SkillsSection, ProjectsSection, CertificationsSection, ProfilePhotoSection) have been updated to add explicit border, background, and text-color classes to all input fields, textareas, and select elements. Additionally, index.css was updated with global CSS rules enforcing always-visible borders, backgrounds, and text colors for inputs/textareas/selects in both light and dark modes, including placeholder visibility and focus/hover states. The glowing blue section title effect is preserved. No files under the constrained paths were modified.
